description_long: This is a compact, single-story house with a simple rectangular structure and a flat roof. The exterior walls are painted white, and the house features large, evenly spaced windows on all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The interior is visible through the open roof, revealing minimal furnishings such as a bed, a desk, and a few decorative items. Surrounding the house are two green, leafy hedges or garden strips, one running parallel to the front and another along the side, suggesting a landscaped yard. A small cylindrical object, possibly a mailbox or outdoor light, is positioned near the front entry. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on openness.
description: A modern, single-story white house with large windows and a flat roof, surrounded by green hedges and minimal outdoor features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with two large windows, the open roof revealing the interior, and a hedge running parallel to the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a single door, a window, and the continuation of the hedge along the side, with a small cylindrical object near the entry.
description_view_2: Side view displaying two doors, three windows, and the hedge extending from the back, with the interior furnishings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two large windows, the open roof, and the hedge running along the front and side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a single door, no porch or steps, and a small cylindrical feature nearby
